title: Error when Moving a Board
excerpt: I have gone to move a board today and have encountered the error “Sorry for the inconvenience, we couldn’t move 1 item”. I have checked and all the items match between the boards, so I am not sure why this is happening a…

posts.author: MHRAircon (Monica Talbot)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have gone to move a board today and have encountered the error “Sorry for the inconvenience, we couldn’t move 1 item”. I have checked and all the items match between the boards, so I am not sure why this is happening all of a sudden. I have noticed there are new steps to do this function that weren’t there previously and since the change I haven’t been able to move any boards across to where I need them!
Anyone have any ideas??

posts.author: Becca-monday.com (Rebecca Katz (monday.com))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @MHRAircon,
Are you still experiencing this issue?
If so, can you please send in a ticket to our support team with a recording of the issue?
Thanks!

posts.author: system (system)
posts.cookedHtml: This topic was automatically closed 7 days after the last reply. New replies are no longer allowed.
